text:
The first search returned no results for the exact title, and the second search did not surface a paper matching this exact title with these authors. Combined with the automated checker findings — that arXiv ID 2402.01234 points to an entirely different paper ("Connection of event shapes to the heavy-flavor baryon enhancement") and the paper was not found in Semantic Scholar, OpenAlex, CrossRef, DBLP, or arXiv — there is strong evidence this reference is fabricated. The author formatting ("Li et al. Chen") is also malformed, which is another hallucination signal.

VERDICT: LIKELY
EXPLANATION: The exact title was not found in any academic database or via web search. The cited arXiv ID (2402.01234) resolves to a completely unrelated physics paper, and the author field is malformed ("Li et al. Chen"), all of which are strong indicators of a hallucinated reference.
LINK: NONE
